sections.heading: Introduction
sections.body: Protecting your data is a priority. We process personal data only on the basis of legal regulations (GDPR, BDSG). This policy explains what we collect, why, and for how long.

sections.heading: 1. Data we collect
sections.body: When you contact us via the website (forms, chatbot, WhatsApp) we collect the information you provide voluntarily: name, phone, email, vehicle details, and any notes. Technical data (browser, IP) is only used in aggregated, anonymised form.

sections.heading: 2. Purpose of processing
sections.body: Your data is used to prepare and handle your vehicle registration request. We act as an intermediary between you and Kreis Steinfurt.

sections.heading: 3. Data retention
sections.body: Lead data is stored for the minimum time required to complete the service (typically up to 30 days after delivery). Conversation logs are auto-purged after 30 days.

sections.heading: 4. WhatsApp
sections.body: When you contact us via WhatsApp, Meta Platforms (WhatsApp) processes your data according to its own policies. Please review them before using this channel.

sections.heading: 5. Chatbot
sections.body: Our chatbot runs on a self-hosted n8n instance in the EU. Messages are processed solely to respond to your request.

sections.heading: 6. Your rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of your data. Contact us at info@civic-concierge.de to exercise these rights.

sections.heading: 1. Scope of service
sections.body: We act as an intermediary between you and Kreis Steinfurt for vehicle registration, re-registration, deregistration, and plate services.

sections.heading: 2. Fees
sections.body: Our service fee is agreed before we start work. Authority fees are passed through at cost.

sections.heading: 3. Cancellation
sections.body: You may cancel free of charge until we begin processing at the authority. After that, a partial fee may apply.

sections.heading: 4. Liability
sections.body: We are liable for damages caused by our negligence to the extent permitted by German law.

sections.heading: Essential
sections.body: We store a session identifier in your browser so the chatbot can keep track of your conversation. No personal data is stored.

sections.heading: Analytics (optional)
sections.body: Only after you accept, we collect anonymised, cookieless metrics via Plausible or Umami to understand which pages are helpful.

sections.heading: Re-open settings
sections.body: You can re-open the privacy settings at any time via the 'Privacy settings' link in the footer.
